test_1_onboarding.name: New Developer Onboarding
test_1_onboarding.details: The system successfully provided a comprehensive onboarding guide for new developers, including links to relevant documentation and tutorials.

test_2_change_impact.name: Change Impact Analysis
test_2_change_impact.details: The system accurately analyzed the impact of a proposed change on the overall system architecture and identified potential risks and benefits.

test_3_mystery_code.name: Mystery Code Explanation
test_3_mystery_code.details: The system successfully explained the purpose and functionality of a given code snippet, including references to relevant documentation and debugging techniques.

test_4_technology_decision.name: Technology Decision Query
test_4_technology_decision.details: The system provided a well-reasoned and well-supported recommendation for a technology decision, including pros and cons of different options and relevant industry trends.

test_5_unclear_question.name: Unclear Question Handling
test_5_unclear_question.details: The system successfully handled an unclear question by requesting clarification and providing a list of possible interpretations and relevant resources.

recommendations: Continue to refine and expand the knowledge graph to improve the system's accuracy and completeness.
Develop a user feedback mechanism to collect and incorporate user suggestions and ratings.
